name: Ocean Blue Polarized Sunglasses
description: Premium polarized sunglasses providing 100% UV protection with a stylish ocean blue tint. Lightweight titanium frame for all-day comfort.

name: SPF 50+ Hydrating Sunscreen
description: Lightweight, non-greasy sunscreen with intense hydration and broad-spectrum SPF 50+ protection. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes.

name: Tropical Print Swim Trunks
description: Quick-drying, 4-way stretch swim trunks featuring a vibrant tropical palm print. Built-in mesh liner for maximum comfort.

name: Classic Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim straw hat offering excellent sun protection with a classic, timeless design. Adjustable inner band for the perfect fit.

name: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Keep your drinks ice-cold for 24 hours with this durable, double-wall vacuum insulated bottle. BPA-free and dishwasher safe.

name: Canvas Beach Tote Bag
description: Heavy-duty canvas beach bag with waterproof lining and ample space for all your summer essentials. Reinforced handles for durability.
